html:
<style>.dm-name{font-size:18px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:14px}
.dm-specs{list-style:none;margin-bottom:4px}
.dm-specs li{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);padding:3px 0;line-height:1.65;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px}
.dm-specs li::before{content:'—';color:var(--gold);font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px}
.dm-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11.5px;gap:12px}
.dm-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.dm-label{color:var(--muted);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;flex-shrink:0}
.dm-val{color:var(--white);font-weight:400;text-align:right}
.dm-footer{padding:15px 24px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;flex-shrink:0}
.dm-add{flex:1;background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:13px 20px;border:none;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;font-family:inherit}
.dm-add:hover{background:var(--gold2)}
.dm-add.dm-added{background:transparent;color:var(--gold);border:1px solid var(--gold)}
.dm-cancel{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;white-space:nowrap}
.dm-cancel:hover{color:var(--white)}

/* ── Compare bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#cmp-bar{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:3500;background:var(--bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--border2);padding:12px 64px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:16px;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}
#cmp-bar.open{display:flex;transform:none}
@media(max-width:820px){#cmp-bar{padding:12px 16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}}
.cmp-slots{display:flex;gap:8px;flex:1}
.cmp-slot{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);min-width:140px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px}
.cmp-slot.filled{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--white)}
.cmp-slot-rm{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;line-height:1;padding:0;flex-shrink:0}
.cmp-slot-rm:hover{color:#f87171}
.cmp-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0}
.cmp-btn{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px 18px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:background .2s}
.cmp-go{background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);border:none}
.cmp-go:hover{background:var(--gold2)}
.cmp-clear{background:transparent;color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.cmp-clear:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
.cmp-count{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap}

/* ── Compare modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.modal-xl{max-width:860px}
.cmp-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
.cmp-tbl th{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);text-align:left}
.cmp-tbl td{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);vertical-align:top;line-height:1.6}
.cmp-tbl tr:hover td{background:var(--bg3)}
.cmp-tbl td:first-child{color:var(--muted);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;width:120px}
.cmp-img{width:100%;height:80px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.75);border-radius:2px;display:block;margin-bottom:6px}
.cmp-noimg{width:100%;height:80px;background:var(--bg3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:6px}

/* ── Compare button on card ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pc-cmp{position:absolute;top:42px;right:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.9);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;opacity:0;z-index:3;font-family:inherit;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
.pc:hover .pc-cmp,.pc-cmp.in-cmp{opacity:1}
.pc-cmp:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(212,175,55,.1)}
.pc-cmp.in-cmp{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(212,175,55,.15)}

/* ── Section TOC indicator ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#sec-toc{position:fixed;right:18px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:3000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
#sec-toc.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
@media(max-width:900px){#sec-toc{display:none}}
@media print{#sec-toc{display:none!important}}
.toc-dot{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;cursor:pointer}
.toc-dot-inner{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid rgba(212,175,55,.4);background:transparent;transition:all .25s;flex-shrink:0}
.toc-dot:hover .toc-dot-inner,.toc-dot.active .toc-dot-inner{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold);width:9px;height:9px}
.toc-label{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;transform:translateX(6px);transition:all .2s;pointer-events:none}
.toc-dot:hover .toc-label{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}

/* ── Print button ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#print-btn{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:8px 13px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
#print-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
#print-btn svg{flex-shrink:0}

/* ── @media print ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media print{
  *{-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact!important;print-color-adjust:exact!important}
  #scroll-progress,#back-top,#wafloat,#qfloat,#cmp-bar,#modal-detail,#modal-cmp,
  .modal-overlay,nav,#sbar,#sub-pills,.cover,#xidmetler,#contact,footer,
  .skip-link,#print-btn{display:none!important}
  body{background:#fff!important;color:#111!important;margin:0;padding:0}
  .print-header{display:block!important}
  #overview{padding:16px 24px!important}
  .sec-eye{color:#888!important;font-size:8px!important}
  .sec-h2{color:#111!important;font-size:18px!important}
  .pgrid{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)!important;gap:12px!important;padding:0!important}
  .pc{background:#f9f9f9!important;border:1px solid #ddd!important;border-radius:4px!important;break-inside:avoid!important;page-break-inside:avoid!important}
  .pc.hidden{display:none!important}
  .pc-thumb{height:100px!important}
  .pc-img{height:100px!important}
  .pc-body{padding:8px!important}
  .pc-name{color:#111!important;font-size:10px!important}
  .pc-code{color:#666!important;font-size:8px!important}
  .pc-ul li{color:#444!important;font-size:8px!important}
  .pc-meta{border-top:1px solid #eee!important}
  .pc-meta span{color:#555!important;font-size:8px!important}
  .pc-add,.pc-cmp,.pc-badges{display:none!important}
  .bdg-haccp,.bdg-eco{display:inline-block!important;font-size:7px!important;color:#333!important;background:#eee!important;border:1px solid #ccc!important}
  .cat-head{color:#111!important}
  a{text-decoration:none!important;color:inherit!important}
  @page{margin:16mm 12mm;size:A4}
}

/* ── Print header (visible only in print) ────────────────────────────────── */
.print-header{display:none;padding:0 0 14px;margin-bottom:16px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold)}
.print-header h2{margin:0 0 2px;font-size:16px;color:#111;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:700}
.print-header p{margin:0;font-size:9px;color:#666}
.print-header .ph-meta{font-size:8px;color:#999;margin-top:4px}

/* ── Basket counter ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#qfloat-cnt{background:var(--bg);color:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;width:19px;height:19px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--gold);line-height:1}

/* ── Basket box in quote modal ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
#qbasket-box{background:rgba(163,138,31,.08);border:2px solid var(--gold);border-radius:6px;padding:16px 18px;margin-bottom:20px;display:none}
.qb-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.qb-title::before{content:'';width:18px;height:2px;background:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0}
.qb-count{background:var(--gold);color:#fff;border-radius:50%;width:20px;height:20px;font-size:10px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-left:auto}
.qb-list{list-style:none;max-height:140px;overflow-y:auto;padding:0}
.qb-list li{font-size:12px;color:var(--white);padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;background:rgba(163,138,31,.06);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-left:3px solid var(--gold)}
.qb-list li span.qb-code{color:var(--muted);font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:auto;font-weight:600}
.qb-list li .qb-remove{margin-left:4px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1;border:none;background:none;padding:0 4px}.qb-list li .qb-remove:hover{color:#f87171}

/* ── Improved spacing ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sec{padding-top:110px;padding-bottom:110px}
@media(max-width:820px){.sec{padding-top:76px;padding-bottom:76px}}
.sec-top{margin-bottom:64px}

/* ── Trust / Social Proof ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.trust{padding:96px 64px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg)}
@media(max-width:820px){.trust{padding:64px 24px}}
.trust-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--border);margin-bottom:56px}
@media(max-width:820px){.trust-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.ts{background:var(--bg2);padding:32px 24px;text-align:center}
.ts-n{font-size:38px;font-weight:300;color:var(--gold);line-height:1;margin-bottom:6px}
.ts-l{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase}
.trust-logos{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:40px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:56px;opacity:.5}
@media(max-width:820px){.trust-logos{gap:24px}}
.trust-logos span{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap}
.testimonials{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:20px}
@media(max-width:820px){.testimonials{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.tcard{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:28px 24px;border-radius:2px;position:relative}
.tcard::before{content:'\201C';position:absolute;top:12px;left:18px;font-size:52px;color:var(--gold);opacity:.2;line-height:1;font-family:Georgia,serif}
.tcard-text{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.85;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:16px;padding-top:10px}
.tcard-author{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);letter-spacing:.06em}
.tcard-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}

/* ── FAQ ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.faq{padding:96px 64px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2)}
@media(max-width:820px){.faq{padding:64px 24px}}
.faq-list{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto}
.faq-item{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.faq-q{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:20px 0;cursor:pointer;gap:16px;background:none;border:none;width:100%;text-align:left;font-family:inherit;color:var(--white)}
.faq-q:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.faq-q span{font-size:15px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.5}
.faq-q i{font-size:20px;color:var(--gold);transition:transform .3s;flex-shrink:0;font-style:normal}
.faq-item.open .faq-q i{transform:rotate(45deg)}
.faq-a{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .35s ease}
.faq-item.open .faq-a{max-height:300px}
.faq-a p{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.85;padding:0 0 20px}

/* ── Cookie banner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#cookie-banner{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:8000;background:rgba(255,255,255,.98);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:16px 64px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:16px;box-shadow:0 -2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08);backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
#cookie-banner.show{display:flex}
@media(max-width:820px){#cookie-banner{padding:14px 20px;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}}
#cookie-banner p{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;flex:1}
#cookie-banner a{color:var(--gold);text-decoration:underline}
.ck-btn{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;border:none;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .2s}
.ck-accept{background:var(--gold);color:#fff}.ck-accept:hover{background:var(--gold2)}
.ck-decline{background:transparent;color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border)}.ck-decline:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}

/* ── CTA pulse animation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@keyframes ctaPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(212,175,55,.4)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(212,175,55,0)}}
.cov-link{animation:ctaPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.cta{animation:ctaPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}
#qfloat{animation:ctaPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}

/* ── Honeypot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hp-field{position:absolute!important;left:-9999px!important;top:-9999px!important;opacity:0!important;height:0!important;width:0!important;z-index:-1!important;pointer-events:none!important;overflow:hidden}

/* ── Reduced motion ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  *,*::before,*::after{animation-duration:0.01ms!important;animation-iteration-count:1!important;transition-duration:0.01ms!important;scroll-behavior:auto!important}
  .cov-img{transform:none!important}
  .rv{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}
}

/* ── Privacy section ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#privacy{padding:48px 64px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2)}
@media(max-width:820px){#privacy{padding:36px 24px}}
#privacy p{margin-bottom:14px}</style>
